title: Backup Policy Block + Discord Delivery Still Broken
summary: April 6 was a quiet infrastructure and continuity day, not a build day. No new FF&E job files, quote captures, or report outputs landed in the Ava workspace, so the signal came from cron review instead. The daily backup created its archive successfully but stopped short of upload because the current Google Workspace rules mark that account as read-only, while the evening crypto alert returned NO_SIGNAL and still could not deliver to Discord.
decisions: Treat April 6 as an infrastructure/continuity day, not a production-work day
Honor the read-only Google Workspace rule in TOOLS.md even when a cron prompt requests Drive upload
Keep Discord outbound repair on the active open-items list until cron delivery actually works
No new sourcing, procurement, or project-direction decisions were recorded from local Ava workspace files today
openItems: Decide whether the Daily Memory Backup should be rerouted to a write-allowed account or have its policy/instructions reconciled
Repair Discord outbound/channel support for cron delivery
Confirm the Nightly Session Journal completes cleanly again tonight
Verify whether expected self-update/use-case reporting jobs are still missing from the active cron set

title: Config Patch + Cron Triage + Memory Checkpoints
summary: April 4 was mostly an infrastructure and continuity day. OpenClaw was patched to keep openai-codex/gpt-5.4 as the primary model while adding a Claude fallback, and memory/checkpoint files were updated throughout the day. Cron review showed the weekly distill failing on a bad model reference, the daily backup still timing out, and Discord/Telegram delivery paths still needing cleanup.
decisions: Keep OpenAI (openai-codex/gpt-5.4) as the primary model for now
Add Claude only as a fallback until auth/model routing is stable
Treat Telegram restoration as a credential issue because the live token is missing/redacted
Prioritize cron reliability before trusting automated delivery
openItems: Restore Telegram with the real bot token
